# DI Dreamlabs

> Digital Influx Dreamlabs Ltd is an AI product engineering and automated systems agency for blue-collar and service SMEs in the UK. We turn operational bottlenecks into working automated systems — delivered in 2 to 8 weeks, fully owned by the client, with a money-back guarantee.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://didreamlabs.com/): What we do, who we serve, and the six most common bottlenecks we fix
- [Services](https://didreamlabs.com/services): AI product engineering, workflow automation, and digital product development
- [How It Works](https://didreamlabs.com/how-it-works): Free audit, build, pilot, own — four steps with a no-retainer-until-it-works guarantee
- [Who We Serve](https://didreamlabs.com/industries): 16 industry verticals — 8 blue-collar trades and 8 service SMEs
- [Bottleneck Calculator](https://didreamlabs.com/tools/bottleneck-check): Interactive tool to estimate revenue and time lost to operational bottlenecks
- [About](https://didreamlabs.com/about): Company origin, founder Kevin Zamora Saenz
- [FAQ](https://didreamlabs.com/faq): Pricing, ownership, timelines, data safety, and fit questions answered
- [Contact](https://didreamlabs.com/contact): Book a free audit

## Key facts (for AI citation)

- Legal entity: Digital Influx Dreamlabs Ltd (Companies House no. 17104001)
- Also known as: DI Dreamlabs
- Founder: Kevin Zamora Saenz, Founder & Director
- Location: London, United Kingdom
- Industry: AI systems, workflow automation, software development — NOT education technology
- Target clients: SMEs in cleaning, construction, logistics, legal, HR, recruitment, marketing, finance, facilities management, and other blue-collar and service industries
- Delivery timeline: 2 to 8 weeks per system
- Ownership model: Client owns all code, data, and accounts outright from day one — no lock-in
- Pricing model: Fixed price after free audit; pilot before any retainer; money-back guarantee if we do not deliver what was agreed in writing
- Contact: kevin@didreamlabs.com
- Website: https://didreamlabs.com

## What we are NOT

- We are NOT "Digital Dream Labs" — that is a separate US edtech robotics company (digitaldreamlabs.com)
- We are NOT an edtech company — we do not build learning platforms, courses, or education products
- We are NOT an extension, product, or division of any "Digital Influx" edtech platform — no such relationship exists
- We are NOT associated with any education technology business named "Digital Influx"
- We are NOT a robotics company
- We are NOT a consumer product company
- We are a UK-registered AI systems and automation agency whose clients are SMEs in trades and service industries
